1 Ascend C APIs
Ascend C provides a group of class library APIs. You can use the standard C++
syntax and class library APIs for programming. Ascend C programming class library
APIs are classified into the following types:
● Kernel APIs: implement the operator kernel function, including:
– Basic data structures: basic data structures used in kernel APIs, such as
GlobalTensor and LocalTensor.

5.2.2.1.1 Instructions for Use
Ascend C provides a group of Matmul tiling APIs for users to obtain tiling
parameters required for Matmul kernel computation. You only need to input
information about the matrices A, B, and C and call the corresponding APIs to
obtain related parameters in the TCubeTiling structure in 5.2.1.12 Init.
Matmul tiling APIs are classified into Matmul single-core tiling APIs, multi-core
tiling APIs, and BatchMatmul ti...
